name: Miniature Chocolate Peanut Butter Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 36 paper baking cups on a tray.
2. In a small bowl, stir together confectioner's sugar and dry milk powder.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, stir together peanut butter and corn syrup until well blended and smooth.
4. Add the sugar mix to the peanut butter mixture and stir until well blended.
5. Turn out onto a work surface and knead for 1-2 minutes until smooth.
6. Press the peanut butter mixture with hands or roll out to 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut into 1-inch circles and set aside.
8. In a small saucepan, melt chocolate pieces over low heat.
9. Spoon about 1/2 teaspoon of chocolate into each paper cup to generously cover the bottom.
10. Place one peanut butter circle on top of the chocolate in each cup, gently pushing it down to coat the sides.
11. Spoon additional chocolate over the top.
12. Refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight until firm.
13. Store in a tightly covered container in the refrigerator.
Make 3 dozen.
